_comment: Display recipe: text_overlay. lyrics_display=scroll_synced, expand_button=true. Precondition: requires content_metadata.lrc_lyrics AND lrc_data + content_type_slug in [song, podcast, narration, movie, lecture]. Provides both timed-text fields so the precondition passes under current AND-semantics. Filename retained as 07-lyrics-karaoke for git history continuity; the recipe slug it exercises is now text_overlay (lyrics_karaoke removed from spec 2026-05-02).
name: Text Overlay (Lyrics) Conformance Fixture
